Script.name: djangomoo_mapper_bridge
Script.script:
-- DjangoMOO → Mudlet generic mapper bridge. -- -- Mudlet's bundled "generic mapper" script populates rooms by parsing -- the MUD's text output. DjangoMOO instead emits the IRE-style -- Room.Info GMCP event on connect and after every move. This bridge -- feeds that GMCP payload into the mapper's documented external-script -- integration points (map.prompt.room / map.prompt.exits) and raises -- onNewRoom, so the mapper's existing pipeline (capture_room_info → -- move_map → find_link / find_me) takes over and creates / links rooms -- as the player moves. -- -- See docs/source/how-to/accessibility.md in the DjangoMOO repo for the -- exact Room.Info payload shape this expects.
local SHORT_TO_LONG = { n = "north", s = "south", e = "east", w = "west", ne = "northeast", nw = "northwest", se = "southeast", sw = "southwest", u = "up", d = "down", ["in"] = "in", out = "out", }
function djangomoo_mapper_bridge(event, ...) if event ~= "gmcp.Room.Info" then return end if not gmcp or not gmcp.Room or not gmcp.Room.Info then return end if not map then return end
local info = gmcp.Room.Info
-- Build a space-separated string of long-form direction names — the -- format handle_exits() expects after its own short→long pass. local parts = {} if type(info.exits) == "table" then for direction, _ in pairs(info.exits) do table.insert(parts, SHORT_TO_LONG[direction] or direction) end end local exits_str = table.concat(parts, " ")
-- map.prompt is the documented integration slot for non-text-trigger -- room detection (see Mudlet generic_mapper help: "map.prompt.room" -- and "map.prompt.exits"). map.prompt = map.prompt or {} map.prompt.room = info.name or "" map.prompt.exits = exits_str
-- Hand off to the mapper's existing pipeline. handle_exits() reads -- map.prompt.room and map.prompt.exits, calls capture_room_info(), -- which calls move_map() — pulling the next direction from the -- mapper's move_queue (auto-populated from sysDataSendRequest) and -- creating / linking the room when in mapping mode. raiseEvent("onNewRoom", exits_str) end
